## What

<One-paragraph description of the artifact added / changed and why.>

## Category

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New prompt
- [ ] New workflow template
- [ ] Generalization of an existing artifact
- [ ] Doc / README improvement
- [ ] Other: <describe>

## Checklist

- [ ] YAML frontmatter is valid; `name:` matches the folder/filename
- [ ] Description names concrete trigger phrases (what a user would actually type)
- [ ] No machine-local paths (`/Users/...`, `C:\Users\...`)
- [ ] No secrets / API keys / private endpoints
- [ ] Top-level `README.md` updated (relevant section + overview table if applicable)
- [ ] House style respected (no emoji, prose / alerts / tables / code blocks)
- [ ] `./scripts/install.sh --dry-run` still runs cleanly from the repo root

## Notes (optional)

<Anything reviewer-relevant — known limitations, follow-up work, related issues, etc.>
